records.ety: [OE. innemest, AS. innemest, a double superlative form fr. inne within, fr. in in. The modern form is due to confusion with most. See In, and cf. Aftermost, Foremost, Innermost.]

defs: Deepest within; farthest from the surface or external part; innermost.
quotes: And pierce the inmost center of the earth.
The silent, slow, consuming fires, Which on my inmost vitals prey.
